items.promptRawJa: Lorsque le véhicule croise un véhicule à sens inverse sur la route dangereuse, il faut______.
items.promptGlossEn: When your vehicle encounters an oncoming vehicle on a dangerous road, you should______.
optionsRawJa: A Ne pas réduire la vitesse.
D Diminuer la vitesse ou s'arrêter et privilégier l'autre véhicule.
optionsGlossEn: Reduce speed or stop and give way to the other vehicle.
items.correctAnswerRaw: Diminuer la vitesse ou s'arrêter et privilégier l'autre véhicule.

Violation of the law and traffic safety rules, and an accident while driving a vehicle, are considered a violation of traffic rules.
When driving a vehicle after drinking, a prison term of more than 3 years will be imposed.
A person who has not obtained a driver's license driving a vehicle, will be held for legal liability.
Cannot make a U-turn in this section.

B once the period for accumulating penalty points has ended
C once the period for accumulating penalty points has ended with less than 11 points accumulated
D once the period for accumulating penalty points has ended with more than 11 points accumulated
